rationale: In the citing paper, Pham et al. (2010) is used as a methodological precedent for testing moderated mediation via ANCOVA. The authors explicitly note that they ran this ANCOVA approach in all studies, alongside their main bootstrapping analyses. This gives the citation a clear functional role in analysis design rather than a passing background mention, even though it is not central to the paper's theory.
relation_description: Scott et al. apply an analysis approach associated with Pham et al. (2010), citing it as support for ANCOVA-based moderated mediation checks across studies. The cited paper is used to justify the statistical procedure, not to provide the core conceptual framework.
